description: Design a microfluidic mixing chip in LibreCAD using millimeters. The design must include a 'SUBSTRATE' layer containing a 75mm x 25mm rectangle with the bottom-left corner at (0,0). On a 'RESERVOIRS' layer, include two 4mm diameter circles centered at (10, 12.5) and (65, 12.5). On a 'CHANNEL' layer, create a zig-zag path connecting the inlet at (10, 12.5) to the outlet at (65, 12.5), oscillating between y=4 and y=21 across the length. All sharp corners of the zig-zag path must be rounded with a fillet radius of 3.0. Save the final drawing as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/microfluidic_chip.dxf.
